name: UBA : MaaS360 malware application installed
notes: Application with malware detected on IOS or Android device.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM MaaS360 Security
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Event ID match MALWARE
when any of Event Category match THREAT
TD_list: APPLY UBA : MaaS360 malware application installed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when any of Event ID match MALWARE
AND when any of Event Category match THREAT
